sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires an explicit continuity witness but does not fully enumerate accepted witness classes.
decisionTaken: Published an allow-list: active_continuation_lineage, telephony_lineage_authority, operator_confirmed_case_id, same_request_convergence_outcome, and human_review_override.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Each witness points to an authoritative lineage, request-context, or governed human-review source rather than a duplicate score.
operationalRisk: A too-narrow catalog may route legitimate follow-ups to manual review until policy expands.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Additive witness classes must be added to the schema, service catalog, validator, and duplicate cases before use.
